data.body: AWS REVIEW-BOT ENV VALIDATION (validation #3): the deployed container compose-review-bot-1 (Gerrit EC2 host, us-east-1) HAS the fix (build_position_commit_map + _is_archived_ticket present — autodeploy picked up main 6845b8326). The fixed resolver works in that git environment: build_position_commit_map walked the tickets history and produced a valid 16,395-entry position->commit map with no error, and the bot's persistent store has 0 null-commit signed ledger entries. A full 'verify-identity --require-authenticated' whole-store run is impractical on that box: the systemd autodeploy timer recycles the container every ~30min, well under the ~1.5h gate runtime (arm64 t4g.large, git-subprocess-bound) — the /tmp run got recycled. The mechanism + deployment evidence confirms the fix holds in the AWS env; the clean CI-under-enforcement result comes from the temp GHA job (full-depth, no autodeploy).
